title: kegelia ruderalis
intro: Kegelia ruderalis, also known as Kegelia or Devil's Claw, is a flowering plant native to southern Africa, valued for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds such as harpagoside, which have been traditionally used to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and treat various health conditions, including arthritis and digestive issues. Health benefits associated with Kegelia ruderalis include relief from muscle and joint pain, improved sleep quality, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Kegelia ruderalis include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are available in various concentrations and dosages, and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
